name: garymike-skills
description: A growing collection of practical Agent Skills: github-profile (design, build, and deploy a GitHub profile README), github-security-audit (audit and harden GitHub account and repositories), mcp-security-review (risk-rate any MCP server), secure-mcp-builder (build and harden secure MCP servers), and skill-security-review (risk-rate any agent skill on both execution surfaces).
